_usage: Used by validate_plan.py rule R002 (shoulder lock). Each top-level key is a body zone. The 'activation_keywords' list contains case-insensitive substrings matched against athlete_static.md. If ANY keyword matches, the corresponding lock rule activates. The optional 'allow_patterns' list (regex strings) exempts specific exercise lines from the lock even when active — used for physio-cleared exercises (e.g. a passive Dead Hang). Leave it empty/absent for a fully-locked default. Override this file in config/injury_locks.json with athlete-specific keywords and clearances.

shoulder.note: Override in config/injury_locks.json with athlete-specific keywords (e.g. language-specific terms) and allow_patterns for physio-cleared exercises
